message:
Add comprehensive TUI state tests for capability prompts and tool progress

New capability prompt tests:
- tui_state_capability_prompt_shows_overlay: Verifies overlay renders
  extension ID, capability name, and action buttons
- tui_state_capability_prompt_navigate_buttons: Tests Left/Right arrow
  navigation between Allow Once, Allow Always, and Deny buttons
- tui_state_capability_prompt_escape_denies: Esc key dismisses prompt
- tui_state_capability_prompt_enter_confirms: Enter confirms selection
- tui_state_generic_confirm_not_intercepted_as_capability: Non-extension
  prompts are not misidentified as capability prompts

New tool progress tests:
- tui_state_tool_update_with_progress_shows_elapsed_and_lines: Spinner
  displays "5s * 42 lines" when progress elapsed >= 1 second
- tui_state_tool_progress_hidden_under_one_second: Sub-second progress
  is suppressed to reduce visual noise
- tui_state_tool_progress_reset_on_new_tool_start: Starting a new tool
  clears previous tool's progress from spinner display

Unit tests for helpers:
- format_count_suffixes: Validates 1K/1M/1B formatting
- tool_progress_format_display: Display string generation
- tool_progress_update_from_details: JSON details parsing
- tool_message_auto_collapse_threshold: Long messages auto-collapse
- non_tool_message_never_collapsed: User/assistant messages stay expanded

Schema updates:
- Add collapsed: false to ConversationMessage in conversation_from_session
  and all test helper functions (user_msg, assistant_msg)
- Update expand_tools toggle assertions for renamed collapse indicator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
